starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For small teams testing their first assistant flows.
starter.summary: A lighter entry point with the essentials you need to launch, validate, and learn what your users actually need.
starter.idealFor: Teams that want a simple pilot with a small number of users and a very clear scope.
highlights: Cover a small team or pilot group

growth.name: Growth
growth.tagline: For companies turning one use case into a real internal product.
growth.summary: This is the main plan for teams that already see value and now want better automation, broader access, and more room to grow.
growth.idealFor: Teams that want a stronger operational setup and expect more users, messages, and workflows.

Support more teams with less manual work

scale.name: Scale
scale.tagline: For larger rollouts, advanced governance, and tailored setups.
scale.summary: Built for companies that need broader control, more integrations, and pricing adapted to their structure and volume.
scale.idealFor: Organizations with multiple teams, more stakeholders, and a need for custom limits or rollout planning.

Paragraphs.1-1: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of MyDigitalBot, a solution provided by Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda, which enables communication between organizations and users through digital channels and interaction with automated assistants.
Paragraphs.2-1: MyDigitalBot operates through communication channels used by organizations, including, by way of example, platforms such as Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, or other integrated channels.
Paragraphs.3-1: Access to MyDigitalBot is provided within the context of an organization and depends on the settings, permissions, and licenses defined by that organization and by the services and platforms used (e.g. Microsoft 365 or other equivalent services).
Paragraphs.3-2: The user undertakes to use the service responsibly and in compliance with the law.
Paragraphs.5-1: The user is responsible for the content they send or share through MyDigitalBot.
Paragraphs.5-2: By using the service, the user grants Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda a limited, non-exclusive, and temporary license to process such content, strictly to the extent necessary to operate, maintain, and improve the service.
Paragraphs.6-1: MyDigitalBot may include features based on artificial intelligence, enabling the generation of automatic responses.
Paragraphs.6-2: The generated responses may not be fully accurate or complete and should therefore not be considered professional or binding advice.
Paragraphs.7-1: The application may send messages, notifications, or campaigns configured by the organization using the service.
Paragraphs.7-2: The user may stop receiving communications by uninstalling the application or through the mechanisms made available by the organization or by the channel used.
Paragraphs.8-1: MyDigitalBot is provided 'as is', and interruptions, limitations, or failures may occur, namely due to technical reasons, maintenance, or dependence on third-party services.
Paragraphs.8-2: Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda does not guarantee that the service will be continuously available or error-free.
Paragraphs.9-1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including loss of data, business interruption, or loss of profits.
Paragraphs.10-1: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the MyDigitalBot Privacy Policy, available on this page.
Paragraphs.11-1: Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda may update these Terms of Use at any time.
Paragraphs.11-2: The most recent version will always be made available on this page, indicating the update date.
Paragraphs.12-1: These Terms are governed by Portuguese law.
Paragraphs.12-2: In the event of a dispute, the court of the district of Maia shall have jurisdiction, with express waiver of any other.
Paragraphs.13-1: For any questions related to these Terms:

Paragraphs.0-1: This Privacy Policy describes how Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda collects, uses, stores, and protects the personal data of MyDigitalBot users.
Paragraphs.0-2: MyDigitalBot is a communication and conversational interaction solution that allows organizations to communicate with users through integrated digital channels and provide automated assistants with artificial intelligence to answer questions, provide support, and facilitate access to information and services.
Paragraphs.0-3: MyDigitalBot acts as a technological platform that allows organizations to communicate with their users and provide automated assistants, and data processing may occur both in the context of Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda and of the organizations using the solution.
Paragraphs.0-4: Gazelle Talent – Consultoria Empresarial, Lda undertakes to process personal data in accordance with the applicable data protection legislation, including the Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), as well as the remaining applicable national legislation.

CreateAssistant.creativityHelp: Controls diversity of answers: at 0.5, the Assistant picks among higher-probability options, keeping to the most relevant ones.
CreateAssistant.varietyHelp: Controls randomness: lower values lead to more predictable replies. Closer to zero becomes more deterministic.
